parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
  max_tokens: 120,
  messages: [{
    role: 'user',
    content: 'Score this Upwork job 1-10 for a Bubble.io/no-code specialist (Eterna product studio).

Scoring rules:
+3 Bubble.io explicitly mentioned
+2 no-code or low-code preferred
+2 MVP or new app build (not maintenance)
+1 client from US, Canada, or Europe
+1 no React/Angular/Vue/custom coding required
-3 requires React, Angular, Vue, or custom dev work
-3 clearly not Bubble.io fit (mobile native, game, data science)

Job Title: ' + $json.title + '
Budget: ' + $json.budget + '
Description: ' + $json.description + '

Reply ONLY with valid JSON, no other text: {"score": <number 1-10>, "reason": "<max 12 words>"}'
  }]
}) }}
